Pokémon Yellow Extended — v0.0.1
=================================
Pokémon Yellow with the 3 Johto starter lines added (Chikorita, Cyndaquil,
Totodile + evolutions) as Pokédex #152-160 — 160 Pokémon total. Runs natively
(no emulator). Built from the pret decompilation, recompiled to native code.

HOW TO PLAY
-----------
1. Run Pokemon_Yellow_Extended.exe
2. When asked, select your own legally-obtained Pokémon Yellow ROM (.gbc).
   - The enhancement patch (Pokemon_Yellow_Extended.bps) is applied
     automatically; "<yourrom>.extended.gbc" is created next to the exe.
3. A bundled save (Pokemon_Yellow_Extended.sav) starts you with the 3 Johto
   starters at Lv5 — choose CONTINUE. Delete that .sav for a fresh game.

NOTES
-----
- No ROM is included. You must supply your own.
- This save is for the EXTENDED game only; it won't load in stock Yellow.
- Controls: arrow keys = D-pad, Z = A, X = B, Enter = Start, RShift = Select.
  Esc opens the menu.
